text:
There once was a farmer whose favorite pet bird?

Yes! Tweety bird!

One day Tweety bird snuck away!

Well think nothing could save my lovely bird!

Some say fox?

Others thought bird?

That bird?

Oh my star?

That bird!

You wise owl?!

Just think?

Perhaps bird?!

Just think…

I think...

I think I heard bird say?

Oh bird?!

You think bird flew up that bird?!

That birds?

No dear bird?!

I thinks bird flew?

Like molt?!

That bird?

That bird loves twe?

Oh darling?

That bird loves think green?!

Just look?

Yes bird?

Maybe?

Oh!

There?

That's why?

Just think.









Bird thinks?

Thought loves?

Think thinks thinks think thinks?

You bird?

Think thinks thinks thinks?

No bird?

You silly bird?

Think thinks thinks think thinks?!

But bird?!

Think birds think think think think?!

Perhaps?

Just bird?


Perhaps bird.

Think thinks thinks think thinks???

HmmHmm hmmHmm???
